Cowork-Claw
Pricing Features Sign In

Features

Everything you need to orchestrate AI agents, manage code, and ship faster.

Multi-Agent Orchestration

Send a task and Cowork-Claw picks the best agent — or coordinates multiple agents in parallel. Claude writes the logic, Codex handles tests, Copilot suggests optimizations, all in one workflow.

  • Route tasks to the best AI agent automatically
  • Parallel agent execution for complex tasks
  • Support for Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini, and more
  • Custom agent selection per task
Multi-Agent Orchestration

Isolated Docker Sandboxes

Every task runs in a fresh, isolated Docker container with a full development environment. Install dependencies, run builds, execute tests — all without touching your local machine.

  • Full Node.js, Python, and system tool access
  • Persistent file system within sandbox sessions
  • Automatic dependency installation
  • Configurable sandbox duration
Isolated Docker Sandboxes

GitHub-Native Workflow

Connect your repos, and agents create branches, commit code, and open pull requests. Review diffs in the browser, approve changes, and merge — a full code review loop with AI.

  • Automatic branch creation and code commits
  • Pull request creation with descriptions
  • In-browser diff viewer and file editor
  • Comment on PRs and agents respond
GitHub-Native Workflow

Browser-Based IDE

A complete development environment in your browser. Monaco editor, integrated terminal, git diff viewer, and LSP support — no local setup required.

  • Monaco code editor with syntax highlighting
  • Integrated terminal with shell access
  • Git diff viewer for all changes
  • Live preview for web applications
Browser-Based IDE

Bring Your Own Key

Use your own API keys for AI providers like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. Keys are encrypted at rest and used only within your isolated sandboxes. Or skip the hassle and use the included shared quota.

  • Encrypted key storage (AES-256-GCM)
  • Keys scoped to your sandboxes only
  • Support for Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and more
  • Shared quota included in every plan
Bring Your Own Key

Security & Isolation

Every session is isolated. Credentials are encrypted with JWE. Sandboxes are ephemeral Docker containers with no cross-tenant access. OAuth tokens are scoped and never logged.

  • JWE-encrypted session cookies
  • Ephemeral, isolated Docker sandboxes
  • No credential logging — static log messages only
  • Scoped OAuth tokens per provider
Security & Isolation

Start shipping with AI agents

Sign in with GitHub and launch your first task in minutes.

Get Started View Pricing
